name: Kingsgate Consolidated Limited.
analysis: It is coming off a base, 19% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.7× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$5.8600, stop A$4.5045, target A$6.4800 (0.46:1) — then trail it.
